title: Evolution of the Psychology of Living in the Van

transcript.text: Hello, this video is the evolution of living in the van.
Evolution of the psychology of living in the van.
I made a video a couple months ago about the psychology of living in the van.
Well, I did make a video about the psychology of living in the van.
Then a month ago I made the video about one year anniversary of living in the van.
And then I talked about the evolution of it.
But, I guess the evolution of the psychology of it.
But, yeah, I wanted to make the evolution of the psychology of living in the van.
Because I have some more stuff to say.
And somebody was like, you should do more living in the van videos.
So, yeah, because, yeah, I have, I think I'm, you know, I'm now finally starting to get around to living in the van right.
When I first started living in the van, I was really excited about it.
And it seems like a really exciting thing to do as long as you have, like, a steady passive income like I do.

Like if somebody wants, I mean, I'm sorry if you're not one of those people.

People do it that way by getting, like, a job.

Or people even who make money on the videos if they make enough money.

I can do what I want to do, which is working on my computer, on my site.
